meta.title: Luma Ray3 AI Video Generator | Reasoning Video Model | OpenCreator
meta.description: Explore Luma Ray3, a next-generation video model built for cinematic quality and stronger control. Join the waitlist on OpenCreator.

hero.description: Ray3 is designed for cinematic video generation with stronger instruction following, improved temporal coherence, and production-ready workflows. OpenCreator will provide access as soon as it’s available.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: What creators look for in a next-generation video model

reasoning.title: Reasoning-driven generation
reasoning.description: Designed to better understand intent and refine outputs for more reliable results.

hdr.title: Production-friendly output
hdr.description: Built for workflows that care about color, fidelity, and pipeline compatibility.

temporal.title: Stronger temporal coherence
temporal.description: More stable motion and fewer artifacts across frames in longer shots.

control.title: More controllability
control.description: Better adherence to prompts and creative direction for predictable iterations.

workflow.title: Faster exploration
workflow.description: Iterate quickly on multiple ideas before selecting the best direction.

production.title: Built for real projects
production.description: Optimized for creators who need repeatability, continuity, and usable outputs.

gallery.title: See It In Action
gallery.subtitle: Representative OpenCreator workflows similar to Ray3 use cases

character.title: Consistent characters
character.useCase: Maintain identity and style across multiple shots for coherent narratives.

advertising.title: Advertising-ready motion
advertising.useCase: Generate scroll-stopping video with strong prompt adherence and cinematic motion.

cinematic.title: Cinematic scenes
cinematic.useCase: Create cinematic clips that feel grounded, coherent, and visually polished.

specs.title: Technical Specs
specs.subtitle: A practical view of inputs, outputs, and controls

pricing.title: Coming Soon
pricing.subtitle: Ray3 will be available on OpenCreator soon
pricing.note: Pricing and availability will be updated once Ray3 is integrated into OpenCreator.

0.question: Is Ray3 available on OpenCreator?
0.answer: Not yet. This page is a pre-launch landing page to collect interest.

1.question: What can I use instead while waiting?
1.answer: You can use existing video models on OpenCreator and keep your workflows ready to swap models when Ray3 is available.

2.question: Will Ray3 support video-to-video editing?
2.answer: Ray3 is positioned for stronger creative control. Specific capabilities will be confirmed once the integration is live.

3.question: How will pricing work?
3.answer: Pricing will be displayed on OpenCreator once the model is enabled.

4.question: How do I get notified?
4.answer: Bookmark this page and check back. We’ll update once Ray3 is available.
